notes: US-based global silicone leader with a comprehensive range of sensory enhancer powders and elastomers for personal care. Momentive's silicone sensory modifiers offer performance benefits spanning the full spectrum from soft focus to shine, opacity to translucence, and lubricity to absorbency. Essential supplier for premium skincare and color cosmetics requiring sophisticated texture and sensory profiles.
